features.featureTitle: When a player backs out to the character select screen and re-selects their character, the character's current HP must be preserved exactly as it was — it must NOT reset to max HP. The HP value should be saved (either to backend or persistent local state) before navigating away from the dungeon/game screen and restored when re-entering with that character.

Fix the player attack tick rate so the player attacks every 12 ticks by default (not every tick). Additionally, set level 1 enemies to attack every 21 ticks, scaling down by 1 tick every 5 enemy levels (level 5 = 20 ticks, level 10 = 19 ticks, level 15 = 18 ticks, etc.). These values must be defined as named constants in the combat engine and must not be changed unless explicitly requested.
